name: Wildflower Honey Cake with Indian Summer Berry Compote
recipeInstructions:
STEP ONE:
Cream butter and whisk in honey, yogurt, sour cream, and 1/4 of the lemon juice. Mix flours, salt, baking soda, clove, and walnuts separately. Combine all ingredients gently. Do not whip or beat. Butter an 8-inch square pan. Pour batter into pan and bake at 350 degrees F for 45 minutes until a skewer comes out clean. Cool and unmold onto a cake rack. Cut into 1-inch by 1-inch squares.
STEP TWO: Prepare the Indian Summer Berry Compote--
Combine fruit, mint, and remaining lemon juice with raspberry sauce.
STEP THREE:
Serve cake topped with compote.
